name: OIL & WATER | Sirius Symboli & Symboli Rudolf
description:
An argument between rivals gets a little overheated, and they need to vent some frustrations out, so they call you.

Art by: hakushaku

Umamusume POV

(Scenario 2 uses they/them pronouns for my enby sapphics <3)

Sirius Symboli and Symboli Rudolf do not get along. Former childhood friends turned rivals, they have verbal clashes often. Well, an argument started to get heated in the student council president's office, so you received a text to come over and provide some... assistance.
Basically, you can either help them solve the problem, or you can let them double team you. I vote the latter :D

Author Notes:

this came to me in a dream, and I came to the dream.

I'm not on hiatus or anything, I just took a while to write sjkdgjksd I write when the inspiration strikes me, so uploads are inconsistent ^^;;

SEE??? I have drafts im working on, I swear!! this one just came out because there aren't really any smut bots of Sirius and Rudolf and I wanted to get my back blown out dgksljdgkjl
